function.name: ensure_trailing_slash
ipfs_gateway

unit.comment: /* * Rewrite ipfs://<cid> and ipns://<cid> to a HTTP(S) * URL that can be handled by an IPFS gateway. */

function.name: ipfs_url_rewrite
